title: Klaviyo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Klaviyo and Flodesk are two popular email marketing platforms with distinct strengths and target audiences. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation with deep integrations, while Flodesk focuses on beautiful design and simplicity. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize advanced marketing automation or visual aesthetics.

comparison_table.tool_b: Stunning templates, flat pricing, workflows, link in bio

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want a free tier to start before committing to paid features
You need predictive analytics, SMS marketing, and product review integrations
choose_b_if: You prioritize beautiful, visually-designed email templates
You want unlimited subscribers from day one with transparent flat-rate pricing
You're a designer, photographer, or creative brand without complex automation needs

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is more powerful for e-commerce automation and offers a free tier, making it better for data-driven businesses. Flodesk wins on design, simplicity, and affordability for creative professionals. Both have excellent customer ratings (Klaviyo: 4.6/5 G2, Flodesk: 4.8/5 G2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Flodesk offers the best entry price at $38/month with unlimited subscribers. Klaviyo's free tier is free, but its paid plans start at $45/month. For budget-conscious brands with many subscribers, Flodesk's flat-rate model is typically cheaper long-term.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports. Most email marketing tools can import CSV files, making migration straightforward. However, you'll need to recreate automation workflows and design templates in Klaviyo, as these don't transfer automatically.
